scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start:backend: npx concurrently "npm --prefix backend run start:incident" "npm --prefix backend run start:volunteer" "npm --prefix backend run start:resource" "npm --prefix backend run start:priority" "npm --prefix backend run start:auth" "npm --prefix backend run start"
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
